positive: A whimsical and serene forest scene illustration, featuring stylized deer and crystalline flora among ancient trees. The style is neo-traditional botanical art mixed with modern vector illustration, emphasizing clean, graphic lines and crisp silhouettes. The deer should be gracefully posed and the plants should exhibit exaggerated, colorful blooms. Composition must be balanced and symmetrical, suitable for a central apparel print. Use a limited, harmonious color palette of forest green, deep indigo, soft gold, and creamy white. Strong contrast between the dark silhouettes of the trees and the vibrant foreground elements. Perfect for screen printing on natural fabric.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, artifacts, grain, noise, extra limbs, mutated, bad anatomy, cropped, out of frame, poorly drawn, photographic, photorealism
